messages.text: not hungry. leave it if u want
not hiding lol just skint and knackered. town's dead anyway stop being mardy
dropout arc going elite tonight lads. mum thinks im 'having a think' when im just losing ranked again
Bad week isn't your whole life, lad. Eat something, sleep a bit. You're not finished because college went sideways.
sent u a meme instead of a personality, enjoy
feels rigged mate. like everyone's having a laugh and im the punchline. tired of pretending its banter
Sorry Nan only just seen this. I'm alright duck, hope your knee's not playing up. I'll pop round soon x
yeah makes sense tbf. need some actual discipline not just doomscrolling like an NPC till 5am
got a delivery shift tonight btw. only a few hours but still
actually made some coin tonight. freezing but beats sitting in the room rotting lol
Few lads in August, Peak way. Food, hills, clear heads. No pressure. Think it'd do you good getting out that room.
maybe mate depends if im working / alive. dont hold a royal procession for me
is it weird meeting lads from online if you've known em ages? not saying i am, just wondering
Tea later if you want it x
they're not weird uncles. you don't know them so maybe don't chat like you do
It's just food, hills, and getting your head straight, lad. Nothing heavy. You'd be looked after.
nah im not even drunk just saying some people online get it more than ppl you've known forever. weird but true
Sorry Nan, woke up late. Yeah I'll come dinner if that's still alright. Don't make loads tho x
Glad you went Nan's. She was pleased to see you. Proud of you for getting out a bit x
might be interested in August. need to think tho. not told anyone, cba with them making it weird
yeah im up. gonna look in a bit, just need a brew first x
might hop on later if ur about. need something that isnt doomscroll slop lol
baz just takes piss whenever i say anything real. acts like im mad for noticing stuff
Nan asked if you're coming Sunday love. Be nice if you did, she misses you ❤️
lol yeah alright internet weirdo reporting for duty later maybe
Don't overhaul your life overnight. Wake, water, ten-minute walk. One kept promise to yourself, lad.
view from the palace mate. grey concrete enrichment arc begins
need to lock in properly now. sick of being a spectator in my own life tbh
got a delivery shift tonight so dont wait on tea. might be late back x
not massive but i actually did the shift. proof before i convince myself it didnt count
maybe duck, depends if this app pays me or robs me again lol
About August, no pressure. Just helps to know which weekends you could do if you decide you want out of that room.
might do more courier stuff over summer. bit of cash and gets me out innit
yeah just doing shifts n trying not to be nocturnal. standard npc sidequest
might have to swerve pub mate, skint as usual. living the dream
You don't owe everyone a full explanation. Some people only ask so they can laugh or pull you back down.
Quiet tonight, lad. What you been up to then, anything interesting?
Nan sent this to my phone: 'Is he coming for roast?' ❤️ I said I'd ask you love.
nan's got antiques roadshow on like its esports. unreal sunday meta
Family time can sting because you know they want more for you. That guilt isn't weakness; it's a sign you need direction.
might jump on deliveries later if i can be arsed. stoke grindset lol
everyone's got apprenticeships or birds or summat. i'm just sat here like an npc with no quest marker
You're not broken, lad. August is just for lads ready to stop drifting and get some air in their lungs. No pressure.
Would your mum be calmer if she heard 'work trial' or 'mates camping'? Not lying for harm. Just keeping her from worrying.
at pickup now. if i do two more nights i can probly cover it. don't wanna say owt at home yet tho
you up? x
might be busy august mate not sure yet. nothing deep
baz just takes piss like it's all internet weirdos. proper mardy about it. he don't get anything serious
Loyalty isn't words in chat, mate. It's who stays when life gets ugly.
in a bit x
wake up, sell your spine for minimum wage, repeat. very normal island lads
Pack light: boots, waterproof, charger, warm layer. Simple. Don't overthink yourself out of something good.
probly yeah x
need to lock in financially lol. sigma courier arc incoming if the app stops being dead
yeah i'll come sunday nan, sorry only just saw. save me roasties yeah x
How was dinner? Your nan sounds like one of the few solid ones. Become steady enough that she never has to worry.
nan was nice as always which made it worse tbh. felt like she could see i'm a failure without saying it
please ring job centre this week x
can you just give me a basic routine or summat. i keep messing everything up and then hiding from it
Seven days: wake, wash, eat, walk, apply for one thing, clean one corner, sleep before 2. August feels easier if you start now.
yeah i’ll look later, got a few tabs open. don’t stress x
is it normal to feel proper sick before doing summat that matters or am i just being mardy
u alive mate or been absorbed into the mattress again
Pack light. Change of clothes, charger, boots if you’ve got them. Keeping it quiet isn’t lying, lad. It’s just adult boundaries.
been sorting life stuff finally. sounds cringe but i need to get out my own head init
soz only just seen. already ate earlier, was sound x
Don’t over-explain to family. Simple story, calm voice. The more you justify, the more they tug at you.
hiking cult? nah duck just touching grass, rare achievement unlocked
Apprentice, mortgage, two kids, dead eyes by 32. Normie speedrun any%. Baz’ll have the platinum soon.
yeah in a bit, just finishing something
actually did a shift today lol. only few hours but didn’t bail. felt decent tbf
Nan’s asking about Sunday dinner. You coming? x
probably yeah, unless i’m knackered. don’t make a big thing tho x
Guilt means there’s still a soft heart in you. Good. But soft hearts need steel around them.
We need to leave soon love. I knocked but you didn’t answer x
dunno yet Nan, maybe do some walking n that. get out a bit more
might be busy August, not sure yet
That pull you feel from home isn’t weakness. Honour them by becoming capable enough that they never have to worry again.
Might be out later duck, dunno yet. Don’t keep owt back for me if ur knackered x
That’s good planning, lad. The guilt is normal. First bit of becoming your own man is feeling the old strings pull.
Mate u gone full cult mode or what 😂 barely see u unless ur posting monk wojaks at 2am
Baz is taking the piss now. Says I’m cult mode. Proper mardy about it ngl, makes me feel like a mug.
dropping this in after-hours lol, Stoke lads when someone says ‘opportunity’ and it’s another warehouse zero-hours shift
Still in. Just need the story to sound normal if Mum asks. Don’t want her stressing or Baz sniffing round it.
